g.text: Each position predicts the NEXT token
Position i predicts token at position i+1
Causal mask prevents seeing future tokens

text.tspan: # Decoder Input: <SOS> y₀ y₁ y₂ y₃
# Target for Loss: y₀ y₁ y₂ y₃ <EOS>
# Key Insight: Position i predicts token at position i+1
# Decoder Input: <SOS> y₀ y₁ y₂ y₃
# Target for Loss: y₀ y₁ y₂ y₃ <EOS>
# Key Insight: Position i predicts token at position i+1
